scripts.ci:backend: cd backend && go build ./... && go vet ./... && go test -race ./... && go run github.com/golangci/golangci-lint/v2/cmd/golangci-lint@v2.12.2 run --path-mode=abs --allow-parallel-runners
scripts.format:check: base_ref="${BASE_REF:-$(git symbolic-ref --quiet --short refs/remotes/origin/HEAD 2>/dev/null || echo origin/main)}"; git diff --name-only -z --diff-filter=d "$base_ref...HEAD" | xargs -0 --no-run-if-empty npx --yes prettier@3 --check --ignore-unknown
scripts.sqlc: cd backend && go run github.com/sqlc-dev/sqlc/cmd/sqlc@v1.31.1 generate
scripts.api: npm run api:spec && npm run api:ts
